who: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 timesheets/month
offer: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 timesheets/month, manual reconciliation causes delays in payroll processing. We simplify reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual reconciliation of timesheets against payroll inputs is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR teams seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll reconciliation tools
DM outreach to HR teams with demo video
Community forums for HR teams sharing software tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly timesheet entry and summary reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
